zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Fauntleroy於1505年出生在英國可瓦爾爾根時，她的父親Peter Fauntleroy30歲，母親Jane Flammock17歲。她於1525年之前與Sir Robert Hill結婚。他們至少是12個兒子和16個女兒的父母。她去世於1582年12月23日在英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 馬比享年77歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 馬比。

nameMeanings.name: Fauntleroy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Old French phrase enfant le roi ‘son of the king’, denoting a royal prince and, as a surname, a member of a royal prince's household.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Fauntleroy was born in 1505, in Heligan, Cornwall, England, her father, Peter Fauntleroy, was 30 and her mother, Jane Flammock, was 17. She married Sir Robert Hill before 1525. They were the parents of at least 12 sons and 16 daughters. She died on 23 December 1582, in St Mabyn, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77, and was buried in St Mabyn, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Fauntleroy est née en 1505, à Heligan, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Peter Fauntleroy, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Jane Flammock, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Hill avant 1525. Ils ont eu au moins 12 fils et 16 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 décembre 1582, à St Mabyn, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à St Mabyn, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Fauntleroy 1505 in Heligan, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Peter Fauntleroy 30 und ihre Mutter Jane Flammock 17. Sie hat vor 1525 Sir Robert Hill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 12 Söhne und 16 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Dezember 1582 im Alter von 77 Jahren in St Mabyn, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Mabyn, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Fauntleroy è nata il nel 1505 nel Heligan, Cornwall, England, sua padre, Peter Fauntleroy, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Jane Flammock, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Hill prima del 1525. Erano genitori di almeno 12 figli e 16 figlie. Morì il 23 dicembre 1582, nel St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Fauntleroyが1505年にイギリスコルンワルヘリガンで生まれた時，父Peter Fauntleroyは30歳，母Jane Flammockは17歳であった。1525年以前にSir Robert Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも12人の息子と16人の娘の親であった。彼女は1582年12月23日にイギリスイギリスコルンワルスト マブインで77歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスコルンワルスト マブインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Fauntleroy(이)가 1505년 영국 코른월 헬익아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter Fauntleroy(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Flammock(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1525년 이전 Sir Robert Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1582년 12월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 마빈에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 마빈에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Hill antes 1525. Eles tiveram pelo menos 12 filhos e 16 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de dezembro de 1582, em St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Fauntleroy родилась в 1505 г. в местности хелиган, корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени Peter Fauntleroy было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Flammock, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Hill перед 1525 г. У них было по крайней мере 12 сыновей и 16 дочерей. Она умерла 23 декабря 1582 г. в местности ст мабин, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности ст мабин, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания.
